entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A climate-resilient, drought-tolerant staple food crop grown in marginal environments of arid and semi-arid regions globally

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand and produce under drought conditions

entities.name: MARGINAL ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Arid and semi-arid regions characterized by poor soil or harsh climatic conditions

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition of nutrient deficiency that pearl millet can help address

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: A method used for whole-genome scan studies to associate genetic markers with traits

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method that uses genome-wide markers to predict the breeding value of individuals

entities.name: SEQUENCING-BASED GENOTYPING
entities.description: A general approach to genotyping using DNA sequencing technologies

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A specific sequencing-based genotyping technique

entities.name: RAD-SEQUENCING
entities.description: Restriction site-associated DNA sequencing used for genotyping

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME RE-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method of sequencing the entire genome of an individual to identify variations

entities.name: PMIGAP
entities.description: The Pearl Millet inbred Germplasm Association Panel, a world association mapping panel developed at ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: ABERYSTWYTH UNIVERSITY
entities.description: A university that partnered with ICRISAT to develop PMiGAP

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as genetic markers in the PMiGAP repository

entities.name: GRAIN FE CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of iron in the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: GRAIN ZN CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of zinc in the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: NITROGEN USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability of the crop to utilize nitrogen effectively for growth and yield

entities.name: ENDOSPERM STARCH COMPONENTS
entities.description: The chemical and structural components of starch found in the endosperm

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: TUNABLE GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A modified genotyping-by-sequencing approach used for genomic selection

entities.name: MULTI-ENVIRONMENT PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring traits across different environments to develop selection models

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION MODELS
entities.description: Mathematical models developed to predict trait values based on genomic data
